meta.defaultTitle: Homes by Haydee | Haydee F Irizarry
meta.defaultDescription: Bilingual real estate guidance in the Charleston and Lowcountry area. Broker Associate with 15+ years of experience.

home.title: Find your home in the Lowcountry
home.subtitle: Bilingual real estate guidance with Haydee F Irizarry
home.intro: Whether you are buying your first home, selling, or exploring the Charleston area, Haydee brings more than 15 years of experience as a broker associate and property manager — in English or Spanish.

buyers.title: Buyer & seller guidance
buyers.body: From pre-approval to closing, Haydee helps you understand each step so you can move forward with confidence — not pressure.

local.title: Charleston area expertise
local.body: Serving Summerville, Goose Creek, Moncks Corner, Ridgeville, and surrounding Lowcountry communities.

bilingual.title: Bilingual support
bilingual.body: English and Spanish guidance for buyers and sellers, including support for the Hispanic community throughout the process.

home.closing: Ready to talk about your next move? Reach out for a no-pressure conversation about buying or selling in South Carolina.

about.title: About Haydee
about.name: Haydee F Irizarry
about.bio1: I am of Dominican and Puerto Rican heritage, born and raised between New York City and Philadelphia. I completed my Bachelor's degree in English at the City University of New York (CUNY) and later earned my New York State real estate license through NYU.
about.bio2: I worked as a real estate associate broker and property manager for more than 15 years. As much as I love New York, I moved to Summerville, South Carolina in 2006 for the weather, southern hospitality, and so my son could grow up with more of a community feel and time outdoors.
about.bio3: As a consumer, I know how exciting and stressful buying a home can be. My goal is to help you reach your dream of homeownership and enjoy the process — understanding each step along the way.
about.bio4: I am bilingual and passionate about helping the Hispanic community improve their quality of life. I will assist you in every way I can so you become an informed consumer, with full knowledge of your options to buy or rent — regardless of immigration status.
about.bioZillow: I moved to the Charleston area to get away from the cold and raise my son in a slower-paced environment. I am a single mom who loves to cook and travel when I can, and one of the ways I help people is by helping them find a place to call home.

contact.title: Contact Haydee
contact.body: Have a question about buying or selling in the Lowcountry? Send a message and Haydee will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.areaValue: Summerville, Goose Creek, Moncks Corner, Ridgeville, and greater Charleston
contact.note: Prefer to connect another way? Mention how you would like to be reached in your message.

resources.title: Resources
resources.body: Helpful topics while you explore buying or selling in South Carolina.

checklist.title: First-time buyer checklist
checklist.body: Review financing, pre-approval, neighborhood research, and closing steps before you tour homes in the Lowcountry.

questions.title: Questions to ask your agent
questions.body: Understand market timing, offer strategy, inspections, and what to expect as a buyer or seller in South Carolina.

glossary.title: Mortgage & closing terms
glossary.body: Plain-language definitions for words you will hear during pre-approval, underwriting, and closing.

bilingual.title: Buying as a bilingual household
bilingual.body: Guidance in English or Spanish so every decision-maker understands options for buying or renting with confidence.

lowcountry.title: Moving to the Lowcountry
lowcountry.body: What to know about Summerville, Goose Creek, Moncks Corner, and nearby communities when relocating from out of state.

management.title: Property management background
management.body: Haydee's experience as a property manager adds perspective on maintenance, rentals, and long-term ownership decisions.
